task_summary: Add SP9 fixture-driven dogfood digest output with static dogfood rows, static [side-pj] issue summaries, outcome/failure-class/rescue-edits grouping, README usage, stdout/output-file behavior, and focused tests.
notes: Mew implemented SP9 with --model gpt-5.5 under experiments/mew-companion-log only. Session #13 stopped before product edits after a duplicated-context edit failure and same-file write-batch wait; Codex closed it and restarted fresh. Session #14 authored the initial dogfood-digest renderer, static fixture, README usage/output examples, and focused tests with 30 passing tests. Reviewer follow-up was needed because the first fixture conflated operator steering with ledger rescue_edits semantics and used generic issue URLs/titles. Sessions #15-#17 repaired the fixture and tests so rescue_edits remains numeric and zero for the sample, issue #4/#5 static summaries match their actual side-project polish topics, and the focused verifier plus stdout/output-file checks pass. No Codex product-code rescue was used.
